title: Living-doc article frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter at the top of every knowledge/**/*.md article. Co-locates metadata with content so the article itself is the source of truth (see knowledge/concepts/methodology/frontmatter-as-source-of-truth.md).

title.description: Human-readable article title. Shown in knowledge/index.md tables.

type.description: concept = standalone reference for one subject. connection = cross-cutting between concepts. meta = about the documentation system itself.

area.description: Project-defined grouping. Drives directory layout under concepts/<area>/. Adopters define their own taxonomy (e.g., methodology | tooling | meta in this repo; mira | macpractice | providers in a typical adoptee).

updated.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) of the last meaningful content update. Drift sweeps prioritize oldest first.

status.description: thin = first-draft, capture-first. mature = has survived a drift sweep without contradicting code. deprecated = superseded; kept for history.

affects.description: Glob patterns for code paths this article documents. Drives the article-mapping for drift checks (see affects-globs.md). Articles without affects are not subject to per-file drift checking but still appear in the index.

load_bearing.description: When true, accuracy is critical (auth flows, public APIs, config schemas). Drift checker treats these strictly (block on drift). Others lenient (warn). Defaults to false when omitted.

references.description: Explicit cross-links to other articles (paths relative to knowledge/). Validators detect orphans by walking the reference graph.
